test.name: Scenario: Login with empty username

kw.name: Given I am on the Mobak login page
Open Mobak Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Opens the browser and navigates to login page

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And I click the login button
Submit Login
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Clicks the login button

kw.name: Then I should see an error message
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'css=.error-message' not visible after 5 seconds.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'css=[class*='error']' not visible after 5 seconds.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Page should have contained text 'Invalid' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
kw.status: Page should have contained text 'Invalid' but did not.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.msg: 'False == True or False == True or False == True' should be true.
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
kw.status: 'False == True or False == True or False == True' should be true.
'False == True or False == True or False == True' should be true.

kw.name: Close Session
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Closes the browser

test.doc: Test login with empty username field
test.status: 'False == True or False == True or False == True' should be true.

test.name: Scenario: Login with empty password

kw.name: Given I am on the Mobak login page
Open Mobak Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Opens the browser and navigates to login page

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And I click the login button
Submit Login
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Clicks the login button

kw.name: Then I should see an error message
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'css=.error-message' not visible after 5 seconds.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'css=[class*='error']' not visible after 5 seconds.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Page should have contained text 'Invalid' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
kw.status: Page should have contained text 'Invalid' but did not.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.msg: 'False == True or False == True or False == True' should be true.
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
kw.status: 'False == True or False == True or False == True' should be true.
'False == True or False == True or False == True' should be true.

kw.name: Close Session
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Closes the browser

test.doc: Test login with empty password field
test.status: 'False == True or False == True or False == True' should be true.

test.name: Scenario: Login with emojis in username

kw.name: Given I am on the Mobak login page
Open Mobak Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Opens the browser and navigates to login page

kw.name: When I fill credentials
Input Username
Input Text

Then I should see an error message or invalid login
Close Session

kw.name: Given I am on the Mobak login page
Open Mobak Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Opens the browser and navigates to login page

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And I click the login button
Submit Login
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Clicks the login button

kw.name: Then I should see an error message or invalid login
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'css=.error-message' not visible after 5 seconds.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'css=[class*='error']' not visible after 5 seconds.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Page should have contained text 'Invalid' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
kw.status: Page should have contained text 'Invalid' but did not.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: ${check1} == True or ${check2} == True or ${check3} == True or ${check4} == True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Close Session
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Closes the browser

test.name: Scenario: Login with SQL injection attempt

kw.name: Given I am on the Mobak login page
Open Mobak Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Opens the browser and navigates to login page

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'admin' OR '1'='1' into text field 'xpath=/html/body/div/main/div/div/form/div[1]/div/input'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And I click the login button
Submit Login
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Clicks the login button

kw.name: Then I should see an error message or invalid login
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'css=.error-message' not visible after 5 seconds.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'css=[class*='error']' not visible after 5 seconds.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Page should have contained text 'Invalid' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
kw.status: Page should have contained text 'Invalid' but did not.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: ${check1} == True or ${check2} == True or ${check3} == True or ${check4} == True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Close Session
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Closes the browser
